# Skill: react-ts-tailwind

Use this skill when adding or modifying React + TypeScript UI with TailwindCSS in Tenax.

## Goals
- Produce typed, composable UI components.
- Keep styling utility-first and consistent via Tailwind conventions.
- Maintain accessibility and responsive behavior.

## Guidance
- Use typed props interfaces and avoid `any`.
- Keep feature-oriented folders and avoid generic utility dumping grounds.
- Favor semantic HTML and accessible interaction patterns.
- Use reusable primitives for repeated layout/patterns.
- Keep class composition readable; extract helpers when class strings become too large.

## Deliverables
- Component/page implementation
- Supporting styles/utilities
- Tests for new behavior
